title: Warm Home Discount: eligibility statement (England and Wales), 2025 to 2026 scheme year
body: "This statement describes the criteria used to determine eligibility for a rebate under Core Group 2.  It sets out:   Low-income criteria - the qualifying means tested benefits which a person must receive to meet the low-income criteria Eligible property types - the types of properties which can be eligible for a rebate   The statement is required under Regulation 9 of The Warm Home Discount (England and Wales) Regulations 2022. "
